name: SPARROW
tagline: Fintech CI/CD built for speed, coverage, and confidence

starry.situation: A mid-sized fintech company was experiencing bottlenecks in their CI/CD pipeline. Build times exceeded 45 minutes, delaying releases and frustrating engineers.
starry.task: The goal was to streamline the CI/CD process to achieve sub-15-minute builds, improve test coverage, and increase deployment confidence.
starry.action: We implemented a containerized build system using Docker and introduced parallelized test execution. Pipeline stages were restructured to eliminate sequential bottlenecks, and caching strategies were applied across dependencies and artifacts.
starry.result: Build times dropped to an average of 11 minutes. Test coverage increased and deployment failures decreased significantly.
starry.return: The team recouped over 55 engineering hours per week, enabling more focus on feature development.
starry.yield: This engagement demonstrated how tactical DevOps enhancements can yield rapid, measurable returns — and how CI/CD maturity directly accelerates business velocity.
